improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion: <meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try 3 free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day."><meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant"><meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access."><meta property="og:type" content="website"><meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.jpg"><meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/"><meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image"><meta name="twitter:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"><meta name="twitter:description" content="Your Claude-powered assistant for trade and business. Try 3 free searches, then join from US$2/day.">
improvements.rationale: These meta tags improve search engine visibility by clearly communicating the product value proposition within character limits. The OG and Twitter tags ensure professional, consistent previews when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Twitter—critical channels for reaching business professionals. Including the free trial and pricing creates urgency and sets expectations before click-through.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a professional workspace built for business owners and traders. Try three searches free — no card required.
improvements.rationale: This headline immediately names the product and its purpose, establishes credibility by specifying the target user, and highlights three key value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace). The subheading reduces friction by emphasizing the free trial with no commitment, driving conversions.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches with Gideon, you'll be invited to become a member to continue. Membership starts from just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's AI-powered trade and business support, voice chat, and your own members workspace. Choose monthly or annual billing—annual plans save you 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel: the paywall experience after the free trial. By clearly explaining what happens next and reinforcing the value and low entry price, it reduces uncertainty and encourages prospects to commit to membership rather than abandoning at the paywall.
